covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from Massachusetts Department of Public Health
covid_surveillance.long_description: Massachusetts Department of Public Health collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

influenza_surveillance.short_description: Weekly influenza surveillance data from Massachusetts Department of Public Health
influenza_surveillance.long_description: Massachusetts Department of Public Health collects and reports influenza surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

rsv_surveillance.short_description: Weekly rsv surveillance data from Massachusetts Department of Public Health
rsv_surveillance.long_description: Massachusetts Department of Public Health collects and reports rsv surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

ari_surveillance.short_description: Weekly ari surveillance data from Massachusetts Department of Public Health
ari_surveillance.long_description: Massachusetts Department of Public Health collects and reports ari surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

ma_dph.name: Massachusetts Department of Public Health
ma_dph.description: Massachusetts Department of Public Health provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Massachusetts covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv, ari . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
ma_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
